name: The Quarter Finals Take Shape
angle: The last eight begins to take shape: Morocco dismantle co-hosts Canada to become the first African nation to reach the quarter-finals more than once, France edge Paraguay through a Mbappe penalty, and the two set up a blockbuster tie as Messi and Mbappe rewrite the all-time scoring record.

questions.question: Morocco knocked out which co-host nation 3-0 to reach the World Cup quarter-finals?
Who converted the 70th-minute penalty that sent France past Paraguay and into the last eight?
Morocco, who reached the last eight again in 2026, are known by which nickname?
Which midfielder scored twice as Morocco beat Canada, striking in the 50th and 82nd minutes?
By reaching the last eight in 2026, Morocco became the first African nation to do what?

options.A: Reach the World Cup quarter-finals more than once
options.B: Win a World Cup knockout match
options.C: Qualify for four World Cups in a row

questions.question: Morocco's deep run echoes 2022, when they became the first African team to achieve what?

options.C: Keep a clean sheet in a World Cup final
options.D: Score in a World Cup final

questions.question: Mbappe's penalty took him to seven goals for the tournament, drawing him level at the top of the scoring charts with which player?
The two July 4 winners were paired together in the last eight. Who will France face in the quarter-final?
France, the 2018 world champions, went all the way to the final again in 2022 but lost to whom?
Paraguay had reached the last 16 by stunning which heavyweight on penalties in the previous round?
After his goal against Cape Verde, Lionel Messi holds the all-time record for most goals at World Cup finals. How many?
Both Messi and Mbappe have now passed which German striker, the previous all-time World Cup top scorer on 16 goals?
France's decisive penalty came after which forward was brought down in the box by Paraguay's Diego Gomez?
Ounahi's opener against Canada was teed up by a set-piece from which Morocco captain and full-back?
Mbappe's strike also made him the record-holder for most goals in World Cup knockout-stage matches. How many has he now scored in the knockouts?

sources: https://www.espn.com/espn/story/_/id/49271700/2026-fifa-world-cup-recap-france-paraguay-morocco-canada-kylian-mbappe (MD23 recap: France 1-0 Paraguay via Mbappe 70' penalty won by Desire Doue off Diego Gomez; Morocco 3-0 Canada, Ounahi 50' from Hakimi set-piece and 82' from Brahim Diaz, Rahimi 90+8'; France to face Morocco in QF)

https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49270266/morocco-defeat-co-hosts-canada-first-team-world-cup-quarterfinals-azzedine-ounahi-soufiane-rahimi (Morocco first African nation to reach the World Cup quarter-finals more than once; back-to-back last eight after 2022)

https://www.aljazeera.com/sports/2026/7/4/ounahi-fires-morocco-into-world-cup-quarterfinals-with-3-0-win-over-canada (Ounahi brace 50' and 82', Rahimi last-kick third; Atlas Lions to the quarter-finals)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Morocco_national_football_team (Atlas Lions; 2022 = first African team to reach a World Cup semi-final, finished fourth)

https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/world-cup-2026-bracket-schedule-scores-results-live-updates-round-of-16-130000983.html (July 4 round of 16: Morocco 3-0 Canada, France 1-0 Paraguay; France v Morocco QF July 9)

https://www.nbcnews.com/data-graphics/mbappe-messi-goal-record-fifa-world-cup-2026-scores-race-rcna351571 (Messi 20 and Mbappe 19 all-time World Cup goals, both past Klose's 16; Mbappe record 10 goals in knockout stages)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2022_FIFA_World_Cup_Final (Argentina beat France in the 2022 final; France were 2018 champions)
